message: assistantOverrides.model.provider must be one of the following values: openai, azure-openai, together-ai, anyscale, openrouter, perplexity-ai, deepinfra, custom-llm, baseten, runpod, groq, vapi, anthropic, anthropic-bedrock, anthropic-vertex, minimax, google, xai, inflection-ai, cerebras, deep-seek, mistral
